name: vibe-handoff
description: Generates complete handoff packages for every transition scenario in a vibe-* project. Five modes: client (project completion), milestone (phase sign-off), dev (new developer onboarding), internal (team handoff between BetaCraft developers), maintenance (handing to client's own dev team). Each mode produces markdown documents plus a single self-contained index.html portal — clean, light-mode, client-readable, combining all docs into one navigable file. Includes delivery doc, feature walkthrough, credentials placeholder, known issues, support guide, sign-off checklist, and roadmap. Reads BRIEF.md, SPEC.md, DECISIONS.md, TASKS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CODEBASE.md. Triggers on handoff: client, handoff: milestone, handoff: dev, handoff: internal, handoff: maintenance, prepare handoff, client delivery, project sign-off, onboard new developer, prepare for maintenance, ready to hand over.
